summary: Fantastic early‑90s soundboard capture with crystal‑clear mix, though reviewers give no detail on the musical performance.
review: Both reviewers praised the recording as a superb soundboard source, describing it as “fantastic” and urging listeners to grab it. No specific songs or performance nuances were mentioned, so the musical quality of the show remains uncharacterized beyond being part of the early‑90s era. Overall the feedback is clearly positive about the audio fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong praise for the soundboard quality (5‑star comment) and a solid 4‑star rating, but only two reviews with minimal detail on the show itself limit certainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a fantastic soundboard; no issues or flaws noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or musical performance were provided.
